title: Pangfeng Liu
text: Home * People * Pangfeng Liu Pangfeng Liu [1] Pangfeng Liu , a Taiwanese computer scientist and professor at the Department of Information Engineering and Computer Science [2] at the National Taiwan University [3] . His research interests covers distributed algorithms, Parallel Search as well as Computer Chinese Chess .
